semantic: opens SQLite store; reads/writes channels, messages, sync state via Store interface
data_flow: db path → Store; Channel/Message/SyncState structs in both directions

semantic: creates client, authenticates, resolves channels, fetches messages
data_flow: API credentials → connected client; channel username → *tg.InputChannel; → []Message

semantic: creates TelegramFetcher and Service; delegates all-source and filtered refresh in TUI mode
creates source Registry; iterates cfg.Sources to register telegram/rss/reddit/hackernews sources
data_flow: SourceConfig entries → source.Source instances in Registry

semantic: creates LLM client (Ollama or OpenRouter) and summarizer.Service; calls SummarizeUnsummarized or SummarizeUnsummarizedForChannels
creates tui.App with store and options; runs bubbletea program; implements tui.RefreshService and tui.SummarizeService interfaces
data_flow: store + opts → tui.App; refresh/summarize callbacks from TUI into main.go adapters

semantic: runs the TUI event loop via tea.NewProgram and p.Run
uses tg.InputChannel as channel handle type from Telegram API
